title: Ultimately Optimized(Old/Moved)
description: "UltimatelyOptimized" – the ultimate FPS boost modpack for Minecraft
body:
This project is old and archived and has been moved to a new account!
link: https://modrinth.com/project/ultimately-optimized-plus




🔥 Welcome to the world of UltimatelyOptimized – where Minecraft performance reaches new heights! 🔥

**Unrivaled Performance:** 
Prepare to be amazed by the sheer speed and fluidity of UltimatelyOptimized. With state-of-the-art performance mods like Sodium and Lithium leading the charge, lag becomes a thing of the past. Experience Minecraft like never before, with seamless gameplay that sets a new standard.

**OptiFine Excellence:**
Delve into the realm of OptiFine with UltimatelyOptimized, where support for shaders, connected textures, and more await. Even those resource packs demanding OptiFine compatibility find their match here!

**Universal Compatibility:**
No matter your world or server, UltimatelyOptimized is your passport to unparalleled performance. Say goodbye to compatibility issues, as our modpack plays nice with any vanilla-compatible server. Plus, our recommended launchers guarantee an optimized experience every time.

**Stay Ahead of the Curve:**
With UltimatelyOptimized, you're always on the cutting edge. Our commitment to swift updates ensures compatibility with the latest Minecraft versions, keeping your modpack fresh and your adventures uninterrupted.

**Fabric-Powered Performance:**
Built on the Fabric mod loader, UltimatelyOptimized combines speed and flexibility like never before. Enjoy a lightweight foundation that seamlessly integrates your favorite mods for the ultimate Minecraft experience.

**Community-Driven Development:**
Join us in shaping the future of Minecraft modding! UltimatelyOptimized is more than just a modpack – it's a community-driven project where user feedback and collaboration reign supreme. Contribute to our open-source initiative and help us create the ultimate Minecraft experience together.

**Need Assistance?**
Check out our comprehensive FAQ for answers to all your burning questions. Got feedback or suggestions? We're all ears – head over to our Discord server to connect with fellow Minecraft enthusiasts and the UltimatelyOptimized team!
